query:
SELECT
                    id          AS "id!: i64",
                    user_id     AS "user_id: String",
                    machine_id  AS "machine_id: String",
                    action      AS "action!: String",
                    target_type AS "target_type: String",
                    target_id   AS "target_id: String",
                    created_at  AS "created_at!: i64"
                FROM audit_log
                WHERE user_id = ?1
                ORDER BY created_at DESC
                LIMIT ?2
